description: Local OpenAPI seed extracted from the working housebuy Worten CLI.

novel_features.name: Canonical product resolution
novel_features.description: Resolve a Worten product URL slug or UUID to the canonical product identifier the other commands use.

novel_features.name: Normalized buyer view
novel_features.description: Return a stable retailer-normalized buyer view instead of raw storefront payloads so downstream tooling can compare products consistently.

novel_features.name: Persistent product snapshots
novel_features.description: Capture and reuse normalized product snapshots on disk so agents can refresh or inspect prior product state without rebuilding the view by hand.

novel_features.name: Normalized stock context
novel_features.description: Combine product, seller, shipping, and optional nearby-store stock context behind one command instead of stitching endpoint calls manually.
